Off Calendar Apr-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of an Adult Person with a Disability.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Kimberly J. Chu, Esq. appeared with Lisa Carlton, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for Claimant Cherie Carlton, who was not present for this morning's proceedings.
Petitioner, appearing via CourtCall, was placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Lisa Carlton Guardian ad Litem for Cherie Carlton was filed on March 12, 2019.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $0.00.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.

The allocation of settlements from other defendants and defendant trusts, as may be recommended by counsel, including bankruptcy and class claims, may be accepted by petitioner, acting on behalf of Disabled Adult Claimant Cherie Carlton, with 0% of the new settlements allocated to the Disabled Adult Claimant, without the necessity of further petition being made to this Court.

Additionally, the Court approves the distribution agreement, in which the Guardian ad Litem participated in on behalf of Disabled Adult Claimant Cherie Carlton, which provides that all settlement and/or judgment funds received in this matter are to be allocated and distributed as follows:

Lisa Carlton - 50%
Linda Rosik - 50%
Cherie Carlton, a disabled adult - 0%
Marie Carlton, a disabled adult - 0%

Order Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of an Adult Person with a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.
